name: portal-os
description: Portal OS — Immersive Chromium-Based Desktop Browser
author: JohannesAFK (StudoX)

scripts.version:patch: cd apps/browser && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && cd ../.. && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: cd apps/browser && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && cd ../.. && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: cd apps/browser && npm version major --no-git-tag-version && cd ../.. && npm version major --no-git-tag-version
